crossStoryFindings: The seeded evidence stays readable, but release-diff polish still depends on keeping the fixture copy compact.
architectureFindings: Verification and cleanup artifacts live beside the tiny target project, which keeps closeout inspection fast.
epicCoverageAssessment: Flow 3 is covered, but the fixture should keep future copy-only cleanups tightly bounded to target-codebase files.
mockOrShimAuditFindings: No shim drift was found outside the dedicated stall scenario.

nonBlockingFindings.title: Future cleanups can normalize habitat wording if the sample set grows
nonBlockingFindings.evidence: The current sample reads clearly, but additional animals would benefit from consistent habitat phrasing.

unresolvedItems: Decide whether future fixture iterations should normalize habitat text or preserve the raw sample wording verbatim.
